summary: Iter_27 polish of the Assistant workflow. All 4 code-review items from iter_26 addressed and verified via code inspection AND main agent pytest (26/26 pass in 31.84s). (1) ADMET rows now carry real data via admet_service.predict_batch; (2) target_prediction slice widened from [:5] to [:15] with drug-likeness sort applied first (MW→400, logP→3); (3) target polling loop extended from 60s to 180s; (4) dead `import target_service` line removed. Testing agent could not complete pytest within its 300s shell budget (test fixture's real ChEMBL pipeline needs ~60-90s per run) but code-inspected all 4 fixes as correct.
code_inspection_results: assistant_service.py L128: preds = await admet_service.predict_batch(...) — verified
assistant_service.py L134-141: drug-likeness sort with (mw-400, logp-3) proxy — verified
assistant_service.py L161: for _ in range(180) — verified (was 60)
assistant_service.py: no `import target_service` — verified (dead code removed)
